headline: Woman Accidentally Emails 'I Hate This Place' To Her Boss, Gets Promoted To 'Chief Honesty Officer'
summary: Her new role involves 'telling people what everyone is thinking.' She regrets everything.
fullBody: Megan McOops meant to text her friend about hating her job. She emailed the entire company. 'I thought I was fired,' McOops said. Instead, her CEO said, 'Finally, someone with courage.' She was promoted to 'Chief Honesty Officer.' Her first task: tell the CEO his haircut is 'a choice.' McOops has been sleeping with one eye open. The original email is framed in the break room.
